---
title: "Innovations"
---

My work involves developing open-source tools, cloud applications, and browser extensions to streamline geospatial workflows for researchers and data scientists.

## 🌍 Earth Engine Apps

::: {.course-list}

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="images/geeai.jpg" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Spectral">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i> Spectral Reflectance Curve</div>
<div class="course-description">Analyze spectral signatures across multiple bands for precise land cover characterization.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[GEE App]{.course-tag} [Remote Sensing]{.course-tag} [Spectral Analysis]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="images/agrimooc.jpg" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Phenology">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-tree"></i> Phenology Signature</div>
<div class="course-description">A specialized tool for crop classification utilizing phenological signatures and time-series analysis.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[GEE App]{.course-tag} [Agriculture]{.course-tag} [Time-Series]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Flood" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Flood">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-water"></i> Flood Susceptibility</div>
<div class="course-description">Implementing Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP) for rigorous flood risk assessment and mapping.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[GEE App]{.course-tag} [AHP]{.course-tag} [Flood Risk]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/floodsusceptibility){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Map" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Map">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-map"></i> Odisha Flood Map</div>
<div class="course-description">Visualizing regional flood extent using multi-date satellite imagery for immediate response support.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[GEE App]{.course-tag} [Emergency Response]{.course-tag} [Satellite]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/odishaflood){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

## 📦 Python Packages

::: {.course-list}

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/27ae60/ffffff?text=Python" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Python">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> geeadvance</div>
<div class="course-description">Advanced functional programming utilities to supercharge your GEE Python API workflows.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Python]{.course-tag} [Functional Programming]{.course-tag} [GEE]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/geeadvance/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/geeadvance){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/34495e/ffffff?text=AI" class="course-thumbnail" alt="AI">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-cpu"></i> deepgee</div>
<div class="course-description">A framework for bridging Earth Engine datasets with state-of-the-art Deep Learning models.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Python]{.course-tag} [Deep Learning]{.course-tag} [AI]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/deepgee/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/deepgee){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="images/geeai.jpg" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Assistant">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-chat-left-dots"></i> geeassist</div>
<div class="course-description">Personal AI coding assistant for the GEE Python environment, powered by Large Language Models.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Python]{.course-tag} [LLM]{.course-tag} [AI Assistant]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/geeassist/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/geeassist){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

## 📚 R Library

::: {.course-list}

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/2980b9/ffffff?text=R" class="course-thumbnail" alt="R">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-book"></i> rpygee</div>
<div class="course-description">A wrapper for running Google Earth Engine Python API within the R environment seamlessly.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[R Programming]{.course-tag} [Python Interop]{.course-tag} [GEE]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-book"></i> Documentation](https://pulakeshpradhan.github.io/rpygee/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/rpygee){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

## 🛠️ Extensions & Tools

::: {.course-list}

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="images/geeaibg.JPG" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Extension">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-browser-chrome"></i> GEE AI Assistant</div>
<div class="course-description">Transform the GEE Code Editor with integrated AI assistance for debugging and script generation.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Chrome Extension]{.course-tag} [Gemini AI]{.course-tag} [Productivity]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-browser-chrome"></i> Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/gee-ai-assistant/kldhacnbicjpbdiebjjflnhgcmheokkl){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/gee-ai-assistant){.social-btn}
:::
:::

::: {.course-entry}
<img src="https://placehold.co/400x250/e67e22/ffffff?text=Capture" class="course-thumbnail" alt="Capture">
::: {.course-info}
<div class="course-title"><i class="bi bi-camera"></i> Quick Screenshot</div>
<div class="course-description">High-resolution browser capture tool optimized for geospatial mapping and documentation.</div>
::: {.course-meta}
[Chrome Extension]{.course-tag} [Visualization]{.course-tag} [Mapping]{.course-tag}
:::
:::
::: {.course-action}
[<i class="bi bi-browser-chrome"></i> Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/koeblknkgkpklkpcbfigakkfnhkkadnm){.social-btn}
:::
:::

:::

:::

:::
